project_context.archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) adapted for Dark Mode
project_context.description: An Arabic (RTL) marketplace for Roblox players to buy items (Adopt Me, Grow a Garden) and trade. The UI must be playful, easy on the eyes (dark mode), and distinctively gaming-oriented without relying on cliché purple gradients. Emphasize rounded, soft forms and vibrant high-contrast accents.

global_rules.tailwind_rtl_strategy: MUST use Tailwind logical properties natively (e.g., `ps-4`, `pe-4`, `ms-2`, `text-start`, `border-s`). DO NOT use absolute directional classes like `pl-4` or `mr-2` which break RTL layouts.
global_rules.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (`@phosphor-icons/react`). Mirror directional icons (like arrows or back buttons) for RTL using `transform scale-x-[-1]` if the icon library does not auto-flip them.

primary.description: Electric Cyan - Playful and sharp, used for primary actions and trade confirmations.

secondary.description: Sunny Yellow - Used for highlights, stars, or secondary playful buttons.

accent.description: Soft Neon Pink - Used for alerts, delete actions, or removing items from the trade grid.

typography.rtl_considerations: Arabic fonts require taller line heights. Use `leading-relaxed` or `leading-loose`. Never use `tracking-widest` for Arabic as it disconnects cursive scripts.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (Padding heavy) to keep it comfortable. Use `gap-6` and `gap-8` for grids.
spacing_and_layout.corners: Playful and friendly: Use `rounded-2xl` or `rounded-3xl` for major cards and modals, `rounded-xl` for buttons and smaller inputs.
spacing_and_layout.container: Max width `max-w-7xl`, centered with `mx-auto`, lateral padding `px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8`.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-[#0F1115] font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-[#252932] text-white font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#2D3748] transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF4B72] text-white font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(255,75,114,0.4)] transition-all

cards.product_card: bg-[#1A1D24] rounded-3xl p-4 border border-[#2D3748] hover:border-[#00E5FF] transition-colors group overflow-hidden flex flex-col
cards.image_container: w-full aspect-square rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-[#252932] relative mb-4

trade_section.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[1fr_auto_1fr] gap-6 items-center p-6 bg-[#1A1D24] rounded-3xl border border-[#2D3748]
trade_section.grid_panel: grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 bg-[#0F1115] p-4 rounded-2xl
trade_section.slot: aspect-square rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed border-[#2D3748] flex items-center justify-center hover:border-[#00E5FF]/50 transition-colors bg-[#1A1D24] relative cursor-pointer
trade_section.filled_slot: aspect-square rounded-xl border-2 border-[#00E5FF] overflow-hidden relative group
trade_section.center_indicator: flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-[#00E5FF] text-4xl

inputs.text: w-full bg-[#0F1115] border border-[#2D3748] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] outline-none transition-all text-start
inputs.file_upload: w-full border-2 border-dashed border-[#2D3748] rounded-2xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center cursor-pointer hover:border-[#00E5FF] hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/5 transition-all text-start

modals.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-[#0F1115]/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4
modals.content: bg-[#1A1D24] rounded-3xl w-full max-w-md p-8 border border-[#2D3748] shadow-2xl relative

image_urls.description: White 3D pet character for Adopt Me product placeholders
Orange cartoon character for Adopt Me product placeholders
Fantasy village/environment for Grow a Garden maps
Hacker/Computer setup 3D image for Steal Brainrot items

testing.attributes: All buttons, inputs, slots, and interactive elements MUST have descriptive `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='trade-slot-left-1'`, `data-testid='buy-button-product-123'`, `data-testid='receipt-upload-input'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure `dir="rtl"` is applied to the root `<html>` element.
Use standard HTML inputs and dialogs enhanced with Tailwind since this is raw React without Shadcn pre-installed. If Shadcn is needed, customize the UI heavily to match this Dark Gaming theme.
For the trade section, implement two 3x3 grids. Add hover states allowing users to click a slot to open a selection modal (catalog), then populate the slot. Include a 'remove' button on filled slots.
For the purchase flow, create a direct manual bank transfer UI showing the seller's account details, an input field for the user's name, and an area to upload a receipt image.
Implement Google/Phone/Guest login options creatively on a modal.
Avoid `ml-`, `mr-`, `pl-`, `pr-` entirely. ONLY use `ms-`, `me-`, `ps-`, `pe-` so the layout perfectly mirrors in RTL.
